candidate_check.description: File extensions must be enabled to match file types in Excel.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Excel 2016 >> Excel Options >> Security >> Force file extension to match file type is set to "Always match file type".

Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key:

HKCU\software\policies\microsoft\office\16.0\excel\security

If value for extensionhardening is REG_DWORD = 2, this is not a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Excel 2016 >> Excel Options >> Security >> Force file extension to match file type to "Enabled" and select the option "Always match file type".
title: File extensions must be enabled to match file types in Excel.
